Mandatory_Conditions: Heifers only at 4 to 8 months of age

Booster_Rule: Annual or every 3-6 months in endemic areas
Annual or as needed before pinkeye season

Mandatory_Conditions: Only by accredited veterinarian with tag and tattoo
At least 30 days before breeding season
Before turnout to pasture in endemic areas
Two doses 3 weeks apart before first breeding
Given at fall pregnancy check in autumn
